question: Chapters
feedback: The excerpt only contains a single section heading (1. DARBA BŪTĪBA UN AKTUALITĀTE) and a subheading (1.1. tabula). It does not list the main sections that a thesis typically includes (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Results, Discussion, Conclusion). Therefore the text does not meet the requirement of listing the main sections.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not provide brief descriptions of each section; it only presents the content of one section. There is no overview or summary of what each chapter will cover, so it fails to satisfy the description criterion.

question: Structure
feedback: From the given passage, the overall structure of the thesis cannot be inferred. Only one section and a table of milestones are shown, with no indication of subsequent chapters or the logical flow of the document. Thus the structure is not clear.
